texts.label: text
texts.orig: Whereby LA MAISON ROYALE agrees to grant the TOUR OPERATOR the following terms and conditions set out herein, for La Maison Royale Masaimara.
texts.text: Whereby LA MAISON ROYALE agrees to grant the TOUR OPERATOR the following terms and conditions set out herein, for La Maison Royale Masaimara.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rates are NET (Non-commissionable) in US Dollars and KSH. Rates include applicable government Taxes.
texts.text: All rates are NET (Non-commissionable) in US Dollars and KSH. Rates include applicable government Taxes.

texts.orig: III. Easter Supplement:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An Easter Supplement of US$30.00 per person will apply to 7 th  April 2025 to Easter Monday 10 th  April 2025. IV.Christmas & New Year's Supplements, Residence NILL
texts.text: An Easter Supplement of US$30.00 per person will apply to 7 th  April 2025 to Easter Monday 10 th  April 2025. IV.Christmas & New Year's Supplements, Residence NILL

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A Christmas Supplement of US$30 per person will apply for non-residence to all bookings on 24th, 25th, 26th and 31st December, 2025 and on 1 st  January 2026 Residence NILL

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. TOUR LEADER DISCOUNTS:
texts.text: 3. TOUR LEADER DISCOUNTS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Complementary accommodation will be granted to bona fide tour leaders based on 'half twin' per Ten (10) Rooms paying, provided is pre-booked and confirmed.
texts.text: Complementary accommodation will be granted to bona fide tour leaders based on 'half twin' per Ten (10) Rooms paying, provided is pre-booked and confirmed.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Where the Group is less than 10 Rooms paying and the Tour Operator requires a Tour Leader to accompany the Group, then the following rate for tour leaders will apply subject to availability.
texts.text: Where the Group is less than 10 Rooms paying and the Tour Operator requires a Tour Leader to accompany the Group, then the following rate for tour leaders will apply subject to availability.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. RELEASE PERIOD & CANCELLATION POLICY
texts.text: 4. RELEASE PERIOD & CANCELLATION POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: I. For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 45 and 34 days from the date of arrival, 25% of the contract rate will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 45 and 34 days from the date of arrival, 25% of the contract rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: II. For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 33 and 8 days from the date of arrival, 50% of the contract rate will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 33 and 8 days from the date of arrival, 50% of the contract rate will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: II. In the case of cancellation within 7 days of the date of arrival, or in the case of a 'No Show", 100% of the value of the booking will be charged.
texts.text: In the case of cancellation within 7 days of the date of arrival, or in the case of a 'No Show", 100% of the value of the booking will be charged.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: 2 | P a g e
texts.text: 2 | P a g e

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5. PAYMENT POLICY
texts.text: 5. PAYMENT POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: I. A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due on collection of client(s) accommodation voucher 45 DAYS prior to arrival of the client(s) at the Lodge(s). Bookings not Secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.
texts.text: A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due on collection of client(s) accommodation voucher 45 DAYS prior to arrival of the client(s) at the Lodge(s). Bookings not Secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: II. From time to time La Maison Royale may require that the Tour Operator to make a deposit for large or special groups.
texts.text: From time to time La Maison Royale may require that the Tour Operator to make a deposit for large or special groups.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: III. Should the Tour Operator fail to pay any invoice within the agreed time, the Tour Operator shall pay a three percent (3%) per month (compounded) Late Payment Fee. Delinquent payments shall be deemed a breach/default of contract and La Maison Royale thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.
texts.text: Should the Tour Operator fail to pay any invoice within the agreed time, the Tour Operator shall pay a three percent (3%) per month (compounded) Late Payment Fee. Delinquent payments shall be deemed a breach/default of contract and La Maison Royale thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: IV. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the Tour Operator shall Immediately replace the same with a Bankers Cheque or Cash and additionally agrees to pay three percent (3%) as a Returned Cheque Fee'. Failure by the Tour Operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and la Maison Royale thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.
texts.text: In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the Tour Operator shall Immediately replace the same with a Bankers Cheque or Cash and additionally agrees to pay three percent (3%) as a Returned Cheque Fee'. Failure by the Tour Operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and la Maison Royale thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: V. The Tour Operator agrees to pay any and all costs, including Legal Fees, Court Costs and any other expenses incurred by La Maison Royale /or its nominees in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default of payment.
texts.text: The Tour Operator agrees to pay any and all costs, including Legal Fees, Court Costs and any other expenses incurred by La Maison Royale /or its nominees in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default of payment.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6. CONFIDENTIALITY:
texts.text: 6. CONFIDENTIALITY:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The TOUR OPERATOR confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text: The TOUR OPERATOR confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7. VARIATION:
texts.text: 7. VARIATION:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The contractual rates mentioned in this agreement are subject to change without notice; however, every effort will be made to maintain them. In the event of a change in Government Taxes or Levies affecting the rates mentioned herein, La Maison Royale reserves the right to pass on any increases to the TOUR OPERATOR.
texts.text: The contractual rates mentioned in this agreement are subject to change without notice; however, every effort will be made to maintain them. In the event of a change in Government Taxes or Levies affecting the rates mentioned herein, La Maison Royale reserves the right to pass on any increases to the TOUR OPERATOR.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 8. BREACH OR DEFAULT OF CONTRACT : In the event that the Tour Operator fails to comply with any of the above terms set out in this Contract, la Maison will consider the Tour Operator in Breach and/or in Default of this Contract. In the event of Default, and during the period of Default, the rates stated in this Contract may become invalid.
texts.text: 8. BREACH OR DEFAULT OF CONTRACT : In the event that the Tour Operator fails to comply with any of the above terms set out in this Contract, la Maison will consider the Tour Operator in Breach and/or in Default of this Contract. In the event of Default, and during the period of Default, the rates stated in this Contract may become invalid.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Furthermore, La Maison Royale reserves the right to cancel, without recourse, any bookings of the Tour Operator, whether paid for or previously confirmed. Clearing the Default does not guarantee the re-instatement of this Contract, nor does it guarantee that any cancelled bookings will be re-instated.
texts.text: Furthermore, La Maison Royale reserves the right to cancel, without recourse, any bookings of the Tour Operator, whether paid for or previously confirmed. Clearing the Default does not guarantee the re-instatement of this Contract, nor does it guarantee that any cancelled bookings will be re-instated.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 9. LIABILITY:
texts.text: 9. LIABILITY:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: La Maison Royale, does not and will not accept responsibility for any incident of any nature involving any client(s) who is/are at any property (ies), nor while travelling to or from any property (ies).
texts.text: La Maison Royale, does not and will not accept responsibility for any incident of any nature involving any client(s) who is/are at any property (ies), nor while travelling to or from any property (ies).

texts.orig: 11. APPLICABILITY:
texts.text: 11. APPLICABILITY:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This Contract is Valid for Non-Residents & Leisure Business Only. These rates are not to be used for onward distribution to any Third parties, Online Travel Agents (OTA's) or Hotel Booking Websites and Portals.
texts.text: This Contract is Valid for Non-Residents & Leisure Business Only. These rates are not to be used for onward distribution to any Third parties, Online Travel Agents (OTA's) or Hotel Booking Websites and Portals.
